message:
Add string key interning and shape-aware constructor caching

Intern repeated object keys so V8/JSC uses pointer comparison for
hidden class transitions. Cache a dynamically-generated constructor
per unique key set — V8 pre-allocates in-object property slots,
eliminating per-property hidden class transitions. Beats JSON.parse
on heterogeneous data (0.90x) and reduces materialization overhead
to near-zero on all workloads.
